Complimentary insured delivery across Jordan on orders over 300 JOD

Home  /  Our Story

Three generations of gold

What began at a single workbench in downtown Amman is now one of Jordan's most trusted names in handcrafted jewellery.

Since 1989

Craft is our inheritance

Mahseri Jewellery was founded at a single bench in Amman's gold souq, where our founder learned to draw wire, raise bangles, and finish clasps the way his teachers had — slowly, and by hand.

Three decades later the bench has grown into a full atelier, but the rule has never changed: no piece leaves the workshop until the person who made it would give it to their own family. We work only in hallmarked 21K and 18K gold and 925 sterling silver, and we stand behind every gram.

Today the second and third generations work side by side — one keeping the old techniques alive, the other drawing the clean, modern silhouettes you see in the collection.

0Years of craft
0Pieces handcrafted
0Bespoke commissions
0Generations at the bench

The journey

From one bench to a house

1989

The first bench

Our founder opens a one-man workshop in Amman's gold souq, repairing chains and crafting wedding bangles for neighbouring shops.

1998

A name above the door

The Mahseri storefront opens on King Faisal Street, selling our own designs for the first time under the family name.

2011

The second generation

The founder's children join the atelier, bringing modern design training to traditional goldsmithing — the start of our signature style.

2020

Bespoke studio

We open a dedicated commission studio for one-of-one pieces — engagement sets, heirloom remakes, and pieces built around family stories.

Today

Mahseri online

The full collection comes to your screen, with insured delivery to every governorate in Jordan — and the same hands behind every piece.

What we stand by

The Mahseri promise

I.

Pure metal, honestly weighed

Every piece is hallmarked and weighed in front of you. The purity on the stamp is the purity in your hand — always.

II.

Made by hands, not lines

No outsourcing, no mass casting. Each piece passes through our own benches and our own quality eye before it is yours.

III.

With you for life

Complimentary annual polishing, honest repairs, and resizing for as long as you own your piece. Jewellery is a relationship.

See it in person

The kettle is always on

Visit the atelier in downtown Amman for a private viewing — or start with the collection online.

Shop the collection
MJ MahseriJewellery

Family atelier crafting fine gold and silver jewellery in Amman since 1989. Pure metal, honest pricing, lifetime care.
